items.title: Morocco given AFCON title after Senegal 'forfeit'
items.summary: Morocco was stunningly awarded the Africa Cup of Nations title on Tuesday by appeals judges who overturned Senegal's victory in a chaotic final in January.

items.title: Vinícius says crying celebration aimed at City fans
items.summary: Vinícius Júnior said his "crying" celebration after scoring in Real Madrid's 2-1 win at Manchester City on Tuesday was a response to last season's "stop crying your heart out" banner from City fans.

items.title: Eze's 'magical moment' clinches Arsenal QF spot
items.summary: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta hailed Eberechi Eze's ability to create "magical moments" after his wondergoal against Bayer Leverkusen.

items.title: As Premier League sides crumble around them, Arsenal keep cruising closer to a quadruple
items.summary: Arsenal should feel the pressure as Premier League leaders. Instead, they look comfortable as a quadruple of trophies is in their sights.

items.title: Real Madrid deal latest blow to Guardiola's Champions League legacy
items.summary: For the third straight year, Manchester City were knocked out of Europe by Real Madrid.

items.title: Morocco awarded Afcon title after CAF overturns result
items.summary: Morocco declared the winners of the 2025 Africa Cup of Nations after the Confederation of African Football overturns the result of their final defeat to Senegal.

items.title: Will Champions League be Guardiola's Man City regret?
items.summary: Pep Guardiola is one of the greatest managers of all time, but will his Champions League record be a cause for frustration?

items.title: Afrika Cup-helden Senegal reageren vol ongeloof op uitspraak Afrikaanse bond
items.summary: Het nieuws dat de Afrika Cup niet door Senegal, maar door Marokko is gewonnen , zorgt voor veel ongeloof in het land van de oorspronkelijke winnaar. Maanden na de finale is op basis van een juridisch verdict de uitslag aangepast. Al stapt Senegal naar het CAS om die uitspraak aan te vechten, zo lijkt het.

items.title: Sporting-trainer bijt van zich af na epische comeback: 'Ik verdien meer respect'
items.summary: Sporting Portugal-trainer Rui Borges heeft de persconferentie na de geweldige comeback tegen FK Bodø/Glimt aangegrepen om zijn gram te halen tegenover de buitenwereld. Volgens de 44-jarige Portugees kreeg zijn ploeg de afgelopen tijd veel te weinig respect.

items.title: Senegal sensationally stripped of Africa Cup of Nations title over protest in final
items.summary: Morocco declared 3-0 winners after appeal is upheld Senegal’s players walked off pitch over penalty call Morocco have been awarded a 3-0 victory in this year’s Africa Cup of Nations final after Senegal were sensationally stripped of the title in an unprecedented ruling. The Confederation of African Football (Caf) announced on Tuesday evening that its appeal board had decided that Senegal are “declared to have forfeited the final” that was held in Rabat in January after head coach, Pape Thiaw, and some of his players left the pitch for 15 minutes in protest at Morocco being awarded a penalty. They eventually returned after being implored to by captain Sadio Mané, with Brahim Díaz’s subsequent spot-kick being saved to send the final into extra time when Pape Gueye scored the winning goal. Continue reading...

items.title: Handdoek-schorsing Saibari flink ingekort, PSV'er inzetbaar in groepsfase WK
items.summary: Voor Ismael Saibari krijgt het onverwacht winnen van de Afrika Cup nog eens extra goed nieuws. De schorsing van de middenvelder van PSV wordt door de Afrikaanse bond teruggebracht naar twee duels, waarvan één voorwaardelijk. Aanvankelijk werd hem drie wedstrijden opgelegd voor zijn gedrag tijdens de finale tegen Senegal.

items.title: Bodo/Glimt's fairytale run comes to crashing halt
items.summary: Bodo/Glimt's dream run in this season's Champions League may be over, but they bow out with their heads held high after making history.

items.title: Robertson houdt vertrouwen in Slot: 'Hij probeert antwoorden te vinden'
items.summary: Andy Robertson blijft vertrouwen in zijn manager Arne Slot. De linksback van Liverpool ziet hoe de Nederlander antwoorden probeert te zoeken op de vele problemen bij The Reds .

items.title: Ruthless PSG condemn Chelsea to humiliating Champions League exit
items.summary: Chelsea huddled once and, as if in an act of resistance, huddled again. They gathered once on either side of the centre circle before kick-off, apparently unconcerned by the kerfuffle that followed their weekend antics, and it was the biggest fight they put up on a night that underlined their distance from Europe’s elite. Can anyone say, with hand on heart, that this project is going well? Any sense they could overturn a three-goal disadvantage was nipped in the bud by two quick Paris Saint-Germain goals and, by the time Senny Mayulu had added the third, there was little mistaking how some of the home fans felt about the early trajectory of Liam Rosenior’s tenure. Continue reading...

items.title: Rottier schiet ADO naar de Eredivisie: 'Fantastisch, hier snakte iedereen naar'
items.summary: Evan Rottier was verantwoordelijk voor het enige doelpunt voor ADO Den Haag tegen Jong Utrecht en daarmee schoot hij de thuisploeg naar de Eredivisie. Gevuld van blijdschap sprak hij met onze verslaggever Kalum van Oudheusden.

items.title: Vinícius finishes off 10-man Manchester City as Real Madrid ease into last eight
items.summary: “In football anything is possible,” was Pep Guardiola’s rallying cry and while Manchester City failed to pull off a Lazarus act for the ages, this was a definite one-off wonder of a contest that thrilled all witnesses. Particularly, the first 45 minutes of mayhem headlined by Vinícius Júnior apparently being ruled offside by the referee, Clément Turpin, then onside, which meant Bernardo Silva was then penalised for handball, sent off, and the Brazilian then scored from the spot. Further entertainment also derived from a Guardiola yellow card, Erling Haaland’s equaliser, and a slew of goalmouth incident that mostly continued after the break – including late finishes from Rayan Aït-Nouri and Fede Valverde that were ruled offside, and one from Vinícius that counted. Continue reading...

items.title: Watford beat Wrexham to blow play-off race wide open
items.summary: Watford inflicted Wrexham’s first away defeat of the calendar year with a 3-1 victory to maintain their Sky Bet Championship play-off push.

items.title: Eze and Rice pick off Bayer Leverkusen as Arsenal cruise into quarter-finals
items.summary: Is there anyone who can stop ­Arsenal in this kind of form? The Bayer ­Leverkusen goalkeeper, Janis ­Blaswich, tried his best in a specta­cular first-half performance that kept the Premier League leaders at bay until Eberechi Eze smashed in his first Champions League goal and Declan Rice completed a comfortable victory after the break to seal a third successive quarter‑final appearance. After yet another clinical performance in Europe yielded a ninth victory in 10 games this season, Mikel Arteta will certainly fancy Arsenal’s chances of getting past Sporting in the last eight despite the Portuguese side’s remarkable comeback against Bodø/Glimt that spared them a trip to the Arctic Circle. Continue reading...

items.title: Man City knocked out of Europe by Real Madrid AGAIN
items.summary: Manchester City have been knocked out of the Champions League in the round of 16 as Vinicius Jr scored twice in a 2-1 win for Real Madrid that sealed a 5-1 aggregate victory.

items.title: Dominant Arsenal see off Leverkusen to reach Champions League quarters
items.summary: Arsenal set up a Champions League quarter-final against Sporting Lisbon as superb goals from Eberechi Eze and Declan Rice completed a 3-1 aggregate win over Bayer Leverkusen.

items.title: 'A difficult night' - Chelsea booed off after PSG thrashing
items.summary: Chelsea suffered a crushing 8-2 aggregate Champions League last-16 defeat to Paris Saint-Germain after the holders won the second leg 3-0 at Stamford Bridge.

items.title: Sporting’s stunning turnaround ends Bodø/Glimt’s Champions League run
items.summary: Sporting staged a stunning comeback to beat Bodø/Glimt 5-0 after extra time and reach the Champions League quarter-finals with a 5-3 aggregate victory in their last-16 tie. Trailing 3-0 from the first leg in Norway, Sporting attacked from the kick-off and went ahead in the 34th minute when Gonçalo Inácio headed in from Francisco Trincão’s corner. Continue reading...

items.title: I must have done things wrong if fans not happy - Slot
items.summary: Head coach Arne Slot says he "must have done a lot of things wrong" for Liverpool fans to be "frustrated" at their recent form.

items.title: Chelsea's cheating - was a fine too lenient?
items.summary: Sports editor Dan Roan analyses whether Chelsea's record fine for a raft of Premier League rule breaches was lenient.

items.title: Jones: England would be foolhardy to sack Borthwick
items.summary: Former England head coach Eddie Jones believes sacking Steve Borthwick would be "foolhardy" despite a poor Guinness Six Nations campaign.

items.title: BREAKING: Senegal gestraft, Marokko krijgt dan toch nog de Afrika Cup cadeau
items.summary: Een stevig stukje theater. Veel meer kunnen we niet zeggen van wat er vandaag beslist is door de Afrikaanse voetbalbond. Die heeft Marokko alsnog de Afrika Cup cadeau gegeven, want Senegal is uitgesloten door een reglementsfout.

items.title: Alarmfase rood: beresterke Thibaut Courtois valt uit - deze teams door naar kwartfinales CL
items.summary: In de Champions League waren we klaar voor de terugwedstrijden in de achtste finales. Daarbij viel toch wel heel wat spektakel te noteren. En ook wat slecht nieuws over Thibaut Courtois, die geblesseerd uitviel.

items.title: Prêté par un club de Pro League, un attaquant se blesse : saison terminée
items.summary: Coup de malchance pour l'attaquant uruguayen prêté par Saint-Trond, Andres Ferrari : il s'est blessé et ne devrait plus jouer de la saison.

items.title: En plots gaat het snel: 'Premier League komt aankloppen in Mechelen'
items.summary: Moncef Zekri maakt de voorbije weken heel wat indruk bij KV Mechelen. Dat hij hinkend van het veld moest afgelopen weekend doet niet meteen het beste vermoeden. Ondertussen klopt de Premier League al voor hem aan.

items.title: Club Brugge zoals Anderlecht in 2015 en 2016: wat is er geworden van de helden van de Youth League?
items.summary: Club NXT heeft zich geplaatst voor de halve finales van de Youth League: voor het eerst in 10 jaar voor het Belgische voetbal. Tien jaar later, wat is er geworden van de jonge spelers van RSC Anderlecht die deze prestatie hadden neergezet?
